title: Musi Riverfront in Hyderabad to house East-West Corridor in BOT model, and Gandhi Sarovar in 200 acres
description: The riverfront will be divided into five zones for development, with zone-1 up to Bapu Ghat being taken up in phase-I. Gandhi Sarovar-Puranapul will be Zone-2, Puranapul-MGBS, Zone-3, MGBS-Uppal/Nagole, Zone-4, and from there up to Gowrelly will be Zone-5
